# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  resources:
    - name: nsg
      type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-08-01
      location: eastus
      properties:
        securityRules:
          - name: RDP
            properties:
              protocol: Tcp
              direction: Inbound
              access: Allow
              priority: 1000
              sourcePortRange: '*'
              destinationPortRange: '3389'
              sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
              destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
          - name: SSH
            properties:
              protocol: Tcp
              direction: Inbound
              access: Allow
              priority: 1001
              sourcePortRange: '*'
              destinationPortRange: '22'
              sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
              destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
          - name: HTTP
            properties:
              protocol: Tcp
              direction: Inbound
              access: Allow
              priority: 1002
              sourcePortRange: '*'
              destinationPortRange: '80'
              sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
              destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
          - name: HTTPS
            properties:
              protocol: Tcp
              direction: Inbound
              access: Allow
              priority: 1003
              sourcePortRange: '*'
              destinationPortRange: '443'
              sourceAddressPrefix: Internet
              destinationAddressPrefix: '*'

    - name: vm
      type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      apiVersion: 2018-06-01
      properties:
        ...
      resources:
        - name: networkInterface
          type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
          apiVersion: 2019-04-01
          properties:
            IPConfiguration:
              name: ipConfig
              properties:
                subnet:
                  id: <subnet_id>
                loadBalancerBackendAddressPools:
                  - id: <lb_backend_pool_id>
            location: eastus
            type: VirtualNetworkIntegration
            tags: null
        - name: networkSecurityGroupAssociation
          type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/networkSecurityGroups
          apiVersion: 2019-08-01
          properties:
            id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/{nsgName}
